changes.text: - Add a resistance to cold and a weakness to fire, value dependent on the creature's level (see table below).

abilities.name: Freezing Adaptation
abilities.text: The creature treats environmental cold effects as if they were one step less extreme (incredible cold becomes extreme, extreme cold becomes severe, and so on).

abilities.name: Winter Senses
abilities.text: The creature ignores concealment caused by ice or snow.

abilities.name: Arctic Steps
abilities.text: The creature ignores uneven ground and difficult terrain caused by ice and the difficult terrain caused by snow (reducing greater difficult terrain from ice or snow to ordinary difficult terrain).

abilities.effect: The frostbound creature kicks up the snow, becoming concealed to all creatures that are not adjacent to it until it moves or the end of its next turn.
abilities.name: Snow Spray
abilities.requirement: The creature is standing on or adjacent to loose snow

changes.text: - Add the following abilities:  **Freezing Adaptation** The creature treats environmental cold effects as if they were one step less extreme (incredible cold becomes extreme, extreme cold becomes severe, and so on).  **Winter Senses** The creature ignores concealment caused by ice or snow.  **Arctic Steps** The creature ignores uneven ground and difficult terrain caused by ice and the difficult terrain caused by snow (reducing greater difficult terrain from ice or snow to ordinary difficult terrain).  **Snow Spray** [one-action] **Requirements** The creature is standing on or adjacent to loose snow; **Effect** The frostbound creature kicks up the snow, becoming concealed to all creatures that are not adjacent to it until it moves or the end of its next turn.

name: Frostbound
text: A frostbound creature grew in a harsh, freezing environment, such as a frigid tundra or a region of magical winters, and can better handle cold weather.
